title: pilosella cryptomastix subsp. empodista
intro: Pilosella cryptomastix subsp. empodista, also known as a subspecies of the plant Pilosella cryptomastix, is a type of flowering plant in the dandelion family. It is used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as potentially exhibiting antimicrobial and antiviral properties. Pilosella cryptomastix subsp. empodista can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture for medicinal use, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
